title: X Winch L6
summary: Professional X Winch L6 kinetic winch system with 0-12m lifting height, 20-60kg load options, 750W servo motor, DMX512/RJ45 signal and MADRIX control support for stage kinetic lighting projects.
applications: Concerts; touring productions; clubs; TV studios; theaters; churches; commercial installations
features: 0-12m lifting height for professional kinetic projects
20-60kg load options for different suspended fixtures
DMX512/RJ45 signal with RDM and MADRIX support
750W servo motor with aluminium alloy housing

title: X Winch L1
summary: Professional X Winch L1 model X-K60 compact kinetic winch system with 8m lifting height, 5kg load capacity, 260W power, aluminium alloy housing and DMX512 / MADRIX control support for stage kinetic lighting projects.
applications: Concerts; clubs; weddings; theaters; churches; TV studios; compact kinetic installations
features: 8m lifting height for compact kinetic lighting projects
5kg load capacity for lightweight suspended fixtures
Compact aluminium alloy housing with black spray finish
